raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un preeſch teem tappe
arridsan meſlohts ta patt ka
preeſch winnu Brahteem Nāro-
ta Debleem / ta Kehnixa Dah-
wida Preeſchā / un preeſch Za-
dakv un Akimeleku/ un preeſch
teem Wirfneekteem to Tehwo
Naimmu ſtarp teem Preesteereem
un ſtarp teem Lewiteem/ tik lab-
bi tani masajam Brahtam/ ka
tani Wirfneekain ta Tehwa
Naimna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Dahwids ar teem
Karra Leel-Kungeem /
nodallija pee Kalpoſcha-
nas no Affawa Behrneem/ Ee-
manu un Jeditunu tohs Pra-
weeschus/ ar Kohklehm/ un Soh-
ma-Stabulehm / un Pulkſtent-
scheem / un kas winnu Star-
pā lihdſinati tappe/ tec bija der-
rtgi Wiht pee fawas Kalpoſcha-
nas Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No Affawa Behrneem bt-
ja: Sakurs / un Jahſeps/ un
Netantius/ un Asarelus/ tee bi-
ja Affawa Behrni femm Affa-
wu / kas pee ta kehnixa Roh-
kas Praweechu Dseefmas Dsee-
daja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No Jedituna: Jedituna
Behrni bija: Gedalijus/ un Je-
rus/ nn Jesajus/ Asabijus un
Matatijus tee fecht femm fawu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No Eeinana: Eeinana
Behrni bija: Bukijus/ Matant-
jus/ Uſiels/ Sebuels/ un Jeri-
mots/ Ananijus/ Ananus/ Eli-
atus/ Gidaltus/ Romanti-Ee-
seris/ Jasbekasus/ Mallotus/ O-
tirs/ Maefiots.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schee wiſſi bija Behrni
Eeinana/ ta Kehnixa Redsetaja
eekſch Deewa Wahrdeem / par
Pazelschann ta Ragga / un
Deetws dewe Eeinanin tfchetr-
padeſmits Dehlus un trihs
Meitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schee wiſſi bija femm fa-
wn Tehwu par Dseefaschannu
KIUNGA Namna ar Pulkſte-
nisſcheem/ Sohma-Stabulehm/
un Kohklehm vee Kalpoſchanas
Deewa Namna: Semin to Keh-
nixu/ Affawu/ Jeditunu un Ee-
manu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnu Pulks ar win-
nu Brahteem / kas ta KUNGA
Dseefnas ismahzitti bija/ wiſſi
Saprahtneeki/ divitunts aston-
defimits un astoni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee meſlojahs pahr win-
na Kahrtu weenā Kohpā / tik
labbi preeſch masu / ka preeſch
leelu/ ir preeſch Mahzitaja un
preeſch Mahzekli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta pirma Meſlochanas
Sihme tikke femm Affawu Jah-
sepam. Ta ohtra Gedaltjum/ ar
winna Brahteem un ar winna
Debleem/ to bija diwipadeſmits.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
